results.finalAnswer:
ENTRYPOINT: mcp/stdio/server.js
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/query/verbs - implements the MCP query surface, including graph lookup/path-style verbs
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/ingest/languages - holds language-specific extraction logic for building the code graph
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/ingest - runs the core ingest pipeline that resolves, walks, and digests source into graph data

ENTRYPOINT: mcp/stdio/server.js
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/query/verbs - largest query-facing surface; implements the MCP graph verbs clients call
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/ingest/languages - language-specific extraction layer for building the code graph across supported languages
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/ingest - core ingest pipeline that walks, digests, resolves, and stores graph data

ENTRYPOINT: mcp/stdio/server.js
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/query/verbs - MCP query layer; implements the exposed graph verbs such as lookup/path/report
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/ingest/languages - language-specific extraction; parses JS/PHP/Python into graph symbols and edges
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/ingest - core indexing pipeline; walks files, resolves symbols, and feeds storage/freshness

ENTRYPOINT: mcp/stdio/server.js
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/query/verbs - defines the `graph_*` MCP handlers, so this is the agent-facing query surface
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/freshness - coordinates auto-indexing, git/file change detection, and incremental rebuilds before queries run
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/ingest - does tree-sitter extraction, cross-file resolution, and framework-aware graph building

ENTRYPOINT: mcp/stdio/server.js
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/query/verbs - the user-facing MCP tool handlers live here; `server.js` dispatches almost every verb from this folder
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/ingest/languages - per-language tree-sitter configs/extractors define what symbols and edges the graph can index
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/ingest - the generic indexing pipeline walks files, runs extraction/plugins, and resolves cross-file references

ENTRYPOINT: mcp/stdio/server.js
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/freshness - owns ensureFresh, rebuild vs incremental reindex decisions, manifest/git checks, and query-time freshness
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/ingest - extracts files into nodes/edges/refs via sweep, language configs, extractors, and resolver
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/query - implements the MCP query surface, ranking, budgeting, and compact result rendering
